hero.title: From machine to rental readiness, everything is traceable.
hero.subtitle: TraviXO replaces Excel files, scattered PDFs, and ERP gaps with one clear chain: machine → QR code → VGP compliance → documents → history → rental availability.

1.title: Import Your Existing Fleet File
1.text: Your Excel stays as it is. No cleaning. No reformatting. Upload it and the system structures your fleet automatically.

2.title: Tag Your Equipment with QR Codes
2.text: Generate all codes in one click. Print, stick on machines, and your tracking system is operational.

3.title: Operational the Same Day
3.text: No weeks of setup. Once QR codes are on machines, every scan creates traceability immediately.

problem.title: You Are Managing Equipment Across Excel, ERP, and PDFs
problem.subtitle: This is where losses, errors, and compliance risks come from

1.title: Equipment Goes Missing
1.text: Machines move between depots, sites, and clients. No clear trace. Excel is outdated the moment it's updated.

2.title: Audits Are Manual and Incomplete
2.text: You count equipment, compare spreadsheets, and still have gaps. Missing assets are discovered too late.

3.title: VGP Compliance Is Not Under Control
3.text: Certificates are in folders, dates are in Excel, reminders are manual. Miss one inspection and you are exposed.

4.title: No Single Source of Truth
4.text: ERP handles contracts, Excel tracks equipment, PDFs hold certificates. Nothing is connected.

solution.title: One System Linking Equipment to Compliance
solution.subtitle: Each machine becomes traceable, documented, and audit-ready

1.title: Import Your Fleet
1.text: Upload your Excel. Each machine becomes a structured asset in the system.

2.title: Assign a QR Code to Each Machine
2.text: Each piece of equipment gets a physical entry point. Scan = access to its full record.

3.title: Every Scan Creates Traceability
3.text: Location, user, condition, timestamp. No manual entry. No paperwork.

4.title: Compliance and Documents Are Linked
4.text: VGP dates, certificates, and history are tied to the machine. Always available during inspection.

scanOut.title: Scan-out to client
scanOut.body: When a machine leaves the depot, a scan records who took it, when, and in what condition. No paper, no ambiguity.

scanReturn.title: Scan-back on return
scanReturn.body: Return scan logs condition and notes. Photos can be added. Disputes are resolved with recorded facts.

chain.title: Full history per machine
chain.body: Each asset shows its full lifecycle: movements, users, condition, and compliance status.

recall.title: If a machine expires at a client, you know before it happens.
recall.body: VGP dates are cross-checked with active rentals. If a deadline hits during a rental, you are alerted early enough to act.
recall.cta: No equipment stays in circulation out of compliance.

exceptions.title: What needs your attention is visible immediately

overdueReturn.title: Machine not returned
overdueReturn.body: Expected back but no scan recorded. You see it the next morning without searching.

missingAudit.title: Missing after inventory
missingAudit.body: Audit completed. Missing machines are listed automatically and exported.

vgpExpiring.title: Inspection due during rental
vgpExpiring.body: Machine still at client with upcoming deadline. You act before it becomes non-compliant.

btp.title: Construction Equipment Rental
btp.body: Track lifts, forklifts, generators. Know where each machine is, who has it, and whether it is compliant.

multiDepot.title: Multi-site operations
multiDepot.body: Equipment moves across sites. Each scan updates its location. No guessing.

excel.title: Leaving Excel behind
excel.body: Stop managing compliance in files and emails. Centralize everything around the machine.

finalCta.title: Stop Losing Track of Your Equipment
finalCta.subtitle: Replace Excel, PDFs, and manual tracking with a system that works in the field.

hero.title: About TraviXO
hero.subtitle: Built from real operational problems in equipment rental

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: TraviXO comes from direct exposure to how equipment is managed in the field. Even structured companies rely on Excel, PDFs, and partial ERP data to track assets.
story.paragraph2: This creates gaps: unknown locations, missing documents, and compliance risks. The issue is not lack of tools, but lack of connection between them.
story.paragraph3: We built TraviXO to connect what was fragmented:

list.item1: Equipment linked to a QR code

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Replace fragmented tracking with a clear system where every machine is identifiable, traceable, and compliant without manual work.

efficiency.title: Remove wasted time
efficiency.description: Manual updates, duplicate data entry, and searching across files should not exist.

realWorld.title: Built for field conditions
realWorld.description: Works with imperfect data, changing teams, and real operational constraints.

transparency.title: Data stays yours
transparency.description: Export everything. No lock-in. Full visibility on your operations.

customerFirst.title: Driven by real use
customerFirst.description: Every feature exists because it solves an actual operational problem.

founders.title: Background

list.item1: Experience in technical environments managing equipment systems
list.item2: Process-driven approach to compliance and data reliability

founders.conclusion: TraviXO is built in Paris, hosted in Europe, and aligned with GDPR requirements. The objective is simple: know what you have, where it is, and whether it is compliant.

cta.title: Start Tracking Properly
cta.description: Replace manual tracking with a system built for your operations
